items.title: Lattice Lullaby (Sheet Music)
items.summary: Authored by the Concordant Choir. C minor, 76 BPM. Twelve lines, 38 seconds.

items.title: Southern Arc Field Notes
items.summary: Captain Ren Solare's first three weeks observing the field-line crack. Public record, hand-bound.

items.title: Composed Strength-3 Glyph
items.summary: Refusal-field practice glyph minted at the hub altar. Beginner-friendly composition.

items.title: Thornwood Inn Blueprint
items.summary: Three-room inn with stable wing. Suitable for any open plot of land in the Verge.

items.title: Sandrun Fire-Song (Recipe)
items.summary: Iyatte's clan's combat-style recipe. Three forms, fire-discipline progression.

items.title: Concordia Hub Soundscape
items.summary: Forty-minute ambient track sampled from the seven-spokes tavern at dusk.

items.title: The Seraphine Correspondence
items.summary: Lady Voss's letters to Iyatte of Sandrun, redacted by Lord Curator Asbir. Restricted edition.

items.title: Bog Crossing — Eight Steps (Hand-Drawn)
items.summary: Nymeria's bog crossing path. Three of the eight steps are intentionally illegible.
